channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Israeli attacks kill at least four in southern Lebanon
item.description: Israeli strikes follow forced displacement warnings for nine towns in southern and eastern Lebanon.

item.title: Iran denies proposal sent to US contains ‘excessive demands’
item.description: Iran says Tehran’s response to the latest US proposal to end the war was “not excessive."

item.title: Who could challenge Keir Starmer for the UK PM’s job? Meet the candidates
item.description: The British prime minister has promised change as he battles to fend off leadership challenge.

item.title: Israeli killings in Lebanon rise: Is even the pretence of a ceasefire over?
item.description: Israel and Hezbollah have increased their attacks on each other, despite official ceasefire.

item.title: Iran war effect: Why is Modi asking Indians to avoid foreign trips, gold?
item.description: PM urges Indians to work from home and avoid foreign trips during the global energy crisis due to the Iran war.

item.title: Is the US empire in the middle of a long decline?
item.description: Iran war has put the US in a situation where ‘it’s not in control but can’t walk away’, argues economist Richard Wolff.

item.title: Lebanon Latest
item.description: Days of deadly attacks

item.title: Lebanese civil defence worker captures moment of Israeli strike
item.description: A Lebanese civil defence worker captured the moment an Israeli strike hit a rescue operation in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Israel pushes for hangings and ‘show trials’ for ‘October 7 detainees’
item.description: Israel advances legislation to try October 7 detainees in military courts, raising fears of show trials and executions.

item.title: Cole Allen pleads not guilty to attempted Trump assassination
item.description: Defence challenges involvement of US Attorney Pirro, citing her friendship with Trump, role at gala where shots fired.

item.title: Where did the hantavirus outbreak start, and where has it spread?
item.description: The US and France are the latest to confirm hantavirus cases as evacuations from a cruise ship are under way.

item.title: Barcelona fans celebrate winning La Liga title in El Clasico
item.description: Barcelona's inner city turned into a huge street party after the club beat Real Madrid to win their 29th league title.

item.title: ‘Unacceptable’: What’s Iran’s peace proposal that Trump has rejected?
item.description: On Sunday, Tehran sent a response to an earlier US proposal to end the war through mediator Pakistan.

item.title: Philippine lawmakers impeach Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: Lawmakers in the Philippines have impeached Vice President Sara Duterte for the second time in two years.

item.title: Macron yells at audience for silence during Nairobi University presentation
item.description: French President Macron pauses a speaker mid-presentation at Nairobi University to demand silence from the audience.

item.title: Iran says its demands were seeking peace, while the US’s are ‘unreasonable’
item.description: Iranian foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei says Iran’s latest response was dismissed by the US Baqaei said.

item.title: EU agrees to restore full trade ties with Syria
item.description: The European Council says the move 'sends a clear political signal of the EU’s commitment to re-engage with Syria'.

item.title: UK PM Keir Starmer vows stronger performance as calls for resignation grow
item.description: UK PM Keir Starmer vows stronger performance as calls for resignation grow

item.title: Who is Gerhard Schroeder, Putin’s pick for Ukraine peace talks mediation?
item.description: And will he be acceptable to Ukraine and the West?

item.title: Former Qatar PM: Netanyahu using Iran war to reshape Middle East
item.description: Sheikh Hamad bin Jassim warns Strait of Hormuz crisis is most dangerous fallout of war on Iran, calls for 'Gulf NATO'.

item.title: Taiwan civilians sharpen self-defence skills ahead of Trump-Xi summit
item.description: Taiwanese civilians are flocking to self‑defence courses, amid fears China could one day use force to seize the island.

item.title: Picking up the torch from Shireen Abu Akleh
item.description: Shireen's killing was meant to scare Palestinians into silence. Instead, it has inspired many to speak up.

item.title: Iran says US making ‘unreasonable’ demands in negotiations to end war
item.description: Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei says Iran's proposal to end conflict, unblock Strait of Hormuz is generous.

item.title: Two more cruise ship passengers test positive for hantavirus
item.description: One French passenger and one from the US test positive after being evacuated from the vessel in the Canary Islands.

item.title: Narendra Modi urges Indians to conserve fuel amid war on Iran
item.description: Narendra Modi urges Indians to conserve fuel amid war on Iran
